description: Reference environment — Node.js API + React front end (two-process), preconfigured to import and launch. Clones coderflow-reference-apps and runs the node-react app.

repos.name: coderflow-reference-apps
repos.post_clone_action:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/node-react/api && npm install
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/node-react/web && npm install

application_server.name: Node.js + React
application_server.start_command:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/node-react/api && npm start &
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/node-react/web && npm run dev
